qa.question: is this secure
qa.answer: Yes! ZyncTools runs 100% in your browser. No files are uploaded to any server, so your data stays private and secure.

qa.question: is it safe to use
qa.answer: Absolutely. All tools process files locally in your browser using client-side JavaScript. Nothing is sent to external servers.

qa.question: privacy policy
qa.answer: ZyncTools is privacy-first. We do not collect, store, or transmit any user data. Learn more on our Privacy Policy.

qa.question: what is a meta tag
qa.answer: Meta tags are HTML elements that provide metadata about a webpage. Use our Meta Tag Generator to create them easily.

qa.question: why is my file not uploading
qa.answer: Common causes: file exceeds the size limit, format is not supported, or the browser blocks local file access. Try a smaller file or check the tool's accepted formats.

qa.question: file size limit
qa.answer: Most tools support files up to 100MB. Larger files may be slow or unsupported depending on your device memory.

qa.question: supported file formats
qa.answer: We support JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF, MP4, MP3, WAV, DOCX, CSV, JSON, and many more. Each tool page lists its accepted formats.

qa.question: how to use background remover
qa.answer: 1. Open the Background Remover. 2. Upload a photo. 3. Wait for the AI to process. 4. Download the result with a transparent background.

qa.question: how to convert video to audio
qa.answer: Use MP4 to MP3 or Audio Extractor. Upload your video, select audio output, and download.
